name: Southwestern Garbanzos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, combine onion, garlic, ginger, tomatoes, and 2 tablespoons water. Cook over medium-high heat until the tomato and onion soften and all liquid has cooked off, about 5-8 minutes.
2. Add seasonings. Cook briefly to blend flavors.
3. Add beans, 2/3 cup water, honey, and dates. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
4. Stir in lime juice.
5. Serve in a bowl or over rice.
Serves 4.
